title: Kumoh Configuration
description: Configuration file for Kumoh — a Cloudflare Workers framework powered by Hono + Drizzle.

name.description: The application name. Used for the worker name and resource naming (e.g. D1 database, KV namespace, R2 bucket, queue).

email.description: Email Routing configuration — managed by `kumoh setup email`.

domain.description: The domain with Cloudflare Email Routing enabled (e.g. kumo.ooo).

deploy.description: Deploy state — auto-managed by `kumoh deploy`. Do not edit manually.

domain.description: Custom domain assigned to the worker (e.g. api.example.com). Set during deploy.
